Meaning.En: A biblical patriarch, son of Isaac and Rebekah, and father of the twelve tribes of Israel; also the name of a prominent figure in the Book of Genesis.
Meaning.Example: According to the Bible, Jacob wrestled with an angel and was renamed Israel.

Situation.Vi: Trong Kinh Thánh Cựu Ước, Giắc là tổ phụ của dân Israel.
Situation.En: In the Old Testament, Jacob is a key patriarch and ancestor of the Israelites.

Situation.Vi: Tên Giắc cũng được dùng như một tên riêng phổ biến trong các cộng đồng Kitô giáo.
Situation.En: The name Jacob is also used as a given name in many Christian communities.
